tldr: Phase 1 verification complete — Eran manually confirmed all 4 deferred browser checks pass (login redirect, dashboard placeholder, /login form render, /admin role-redirect). D25 logged (ProtectedRoute redirects role-mismatches to /login by design, not a bug). Phase 1 closed. Next: /replan for Phase 2 (Nova/LLM wiring). No open handoffs. No blockers.
next_commit_name: /replan for Phase 2 (Nova activates — LLMService wiring per DECISIONS.md)
notes: C22 committed 2026-06-07 (47bca18) — loginApi fixed to send JSON {email, password}, verified clean (tsc + network-level contract check by Claude). Eran then manually click-through-verified all 4 remaining browser checks: (1) /login form renders correctly, (2) admin login (admin@manifesto.local/admin123) redirects to /dashboard, (3) /dashboard shows 'Coming soon' placeholder, (4) manager login (manager.smoke@manifesto.local/manager123) navigating to /admin redirects away — to /login specifically. Item 4 initially looked surprising (redirecting an authenticated user to the login page), but Claude confirmed via ProtectedRoute.tsx (lines 12-18) that both the no-token AND wrong-role paths intentionally redirect to /login — documented by Aria in her C18 worklog. Logged as D25 (UX trade-off noted for possible Phase 2+ refinement, not a blocker). All C21 SMOKE_TEST_RESULTS.md items now resolved — Phase 1 is formally complete. Adam's throwaway manager user (manager.smoke@manifesto.local/manager123) remains in the dev DB as a useful fixture for future role-based testing. Next step: run /replan to define the Phase 2 commit sequence (Nova activates per DECISIONS.md D-roster note — LLMService wiring is the Phase 2 trigger).
